persona_pain: Inbox busywork and slow follow-up make you miss the inbound window and look bad to your AE
persona_blurb: Your job is meetings. You live in the gap between marketing handing over a lead and sales getting a discovery call on the calendar. Every delay in follow-up, every manual step, every no-show not chased: that's a meeting you didn't book. These plays close that gap: fast inbound response, warm-signal conversion, and lead recovery without the grind.

recipes.name: Auto-connect on meeting or signup
recipes.outcome: Inbound only: when a meeting/signup source is already connected or imported, prepare same-day LinkedIn drafts for approval. If no inbound source exists, use BDR AI SDR instead.
recipes.needs: HubSpot or FirstTouch-accessible inbound list/import required

recipes.name: Automate due HubSpot social tasks
recipes.outcome: Work today's existing HubSpot LinkedIn/social tasks in the BDR/user queue: connect, message, or follow up through FirstTouch, then mark tasks complete only after queue/send confirmation.
recipes.needs: HubSpot MCP required; use only if HubSpot tasks for social steps are already being created each day; not a cadence/list creator or prospecting engine

recipes.name: BDR AI SDR — daily approval queue
recipes.outcome: Daily engine: discover or load ICP-fit prospects, enrich each prospect, and draft connection-request rows up to the 10/day free or 20/day Sales Nav/Premium connection-request cap for approval. Already-connected message rows use the separate message cap.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required with ICP brief + FirstTouch Discover Contacts; HubSpot list optional

recipes.name: Social engager flow — leadership posts
recipes.outcome: Convert engagement on CEO/exec/leadership posts into booked meetings before interest fades.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required; use leadership, competitor founder, or influencer profile engagement; HubSpot optional for qualification/routing; profile views unavailable

recipes.name: Website visitor play
recipes.outcome: Conditional, most BDRs skip unless RB2B/HubSpot tracking or a visitor list exists: turn pricing/demo/product-page visits into LinkedIn touches while intent is active.
recipes.needs: Conditional; HubSpot tracking, RB2B/list source, or visitor export required; most BDRs skip if no source exists

recipes.name: Social campaigns — special row-level push
recipes.outcome: Build a manager-approved narrow BDR push such as tradeshow-city buyers, no-shows from a provided event/HubSpot list, or connected leadership titles. Default to AI-SDR-like row-level dynamic approvals, not self-serve flow building.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required for Discover Contacts or imported/event lists; HubSpot required for no-show or CRM-history segments; row-level approval by default; manager/RevOps approval recommended

recipes.name: Scoop-up slipped leads — HubSpot no-shows and old MQLs
recipes.outcome: Lead recovery: work no-shows and old MQLs from a HubSpot/event list or RevOps-supplied HubSpot property. If no HubSpot/event source exists, use the imported recovery-list recipe or BDR AI SDR instead.
recipes.needs: HubSpot/event list or RevOps-supplied HubSpot property required

recipes.name: Scoop-up slipped leads — imported recovery list
recipes.outcome: Lead recovery from an imported no-show, event, old-MQL, or dormant-lead CSV/list: enrich the provided people, draft recovery touches, and gate each row for approval. If no recovery source exists, use BDR AI SDR instead.
recipes.needs: Imported event/no-show/recovery list required; no HubSpot required when source rows include enough identity data

example_prompts: "Run the FirstTouch AI SDR play for today: discover ICP-fit prospects, enrich them, and show me an approval table up to my daily connection cap. Do not send until I approve."
"Build today's LinkedIn outbound batch from this ICP and gate every row for approval."
"Find people who engaged with our leadership profile this week and draft connection requests for my approval."
"If HubSpot already creates LinkedIn/social tasks daily, find today's due tasks and run the eligible ones through FirstTouch."
